arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe claims he would leave Man United if he got the same level of abuse as the Glazers - who he claims have 'retreated into the shadows' since his arrival
arts.sum: Manchester United fans have long opposed the Glazers and pressure has ramped up recently with the side currently 14th and set for their worst ever Premier League campaign.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe reveals the one Man United manager he would NOT have hired - and claims ex-boss didn't have the 'personality' to lead big players
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has revealed that he would not have replaced legendary Manchester United manager Sir Alex Ferguson with David Moyes, had he been owner 12 years ago.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo told by ex-Man United pal how League One player, 35, is fitter than him
arts.sum: Darren Fletcher played with Cristiano Ronaldo during his time at Manchester United, but the Scottish midfielder deemed another of his former team-mates to be even fitter

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford fires wordless message to Man United teammate Jadon Sancho after Chelsea update
arts.sum: It was a positive week for Manchester United players Jadon Sancho and Marcus Rashford as they progressed in Europe and the latter also earned an England recall.

arts.ttl: Victor Osimhen transfer news: Man Utd get ‘one condition’ message over deal
arts.sum: Man Utd have made the Napoli striker one of their leading targets in the summer transfer window, with Ruben Amorim’s squad in need of a prolific frontman to add goals to their game. Man Utd, then, will be hopeful that one of their leading rivals to sign the No.9 is effectively knocked out of the running by finishing outside of the top four in Serie A.

arts.ttl: £70m-rated Manchester United star becomes transfer target for his former club
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho is facing an uncertain future ahead of this summer, with Atletico Madrid reportedly keen to re-sign him. The Argentina international spent five years in Atletico’s academy before moving to Old Trafford in 2020 and quite quickly working his way up into the Man Utd first-team. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim wants humility and hunger as Man Utd look to end good week on high
arts.sum: United go to struggling Leicester seeking to build on their Europa League win over Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Champions League giants eye transfer of £70m-rated Man United contract rebel
arts.sum: Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo is reportedly attracting serious interest ahead of the summer transfer window. Following a recent report from the Guardian that Mainoo was looking likely to reject contract offers at Old Trafford, he’s now being linked with Real Madrid. arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'preparing summer move' for Man United star after contract revelation
arts.sum: Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo is allegedly wanted by Real Madrid during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Rare Leicester City partnership gets Ruud van Nistelrooy backing ahead of Man United showdown
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy is backing Jamie Vardy and Patson Daka to be a twin threat against Manchester United this weekend, insisting they look like a natural strike partnership. Vardy and Daka started together at Chelsea after van Nistelrooy opted to switch formations in search of a rare win.
